outreachAngles.label: AI travel tools roundups
outreachAngles.pitch: Offer Pack as an AI-native travel assistant that combines prompts, email confirmations, calendars, and booking context.

outreachAngles.label: Travel productivity articles
outreachAngles.pitch: Position Pack as a way to reduce travel admin by turning existing context into structured plans.

outreachAngles.label: Responsible and reliable AI travel articles
outreachAngles.pitch: Position Pack around reliable travel planning: AI assistance grounded by structured trip facts, visible uncertainty, and fewer unnecessary AI calls.

outreachAngles.label: Points, loyalty, and travel account roundups
outreachAngles.pitch: Position Pack as the trip-attached loyalty context layer: loyalty numbers, points context, traveler profiles, and booking context organized around the actual trip rather than a standalone award-search screen.

outreachAngles.label: Group trip and shared itinerary articles
outreachAngles.pitch: Position Pack for shared itineraries, linked trips, group trip costs, and live views where planning breaks across screenshots, spreadsheets, and message threads.

outreachAngles.label: Travel stats and personal map articles
outreachAngles.pitch: Position Pack around travel history, personal maps, repeat routes, airport patterns, and trip-cost context across flights, hotels, and rental cars.

outreachAngles.label: Airport operations and TSA coverage
outreachAngles.pitch: Use Pack's public TSA board and airport-specific pages as citeable live travel utility content.

outreachAngles.label: Startup and founder profiles
outreachAngles.pitch: Lead with Pack's travel-context thesis and the founders' AI/product background.
